EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The alarm "{subject.name}" is sent via the SNMP protocol for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
Unable to execute a script after the alarm "{subject.name}" occurred for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The script {object.name} is executed after the alarm "{subject.name}" occurred for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
Failed to send the alarm "{subject.name}" via email for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The alarm "{subject.name}" is sent via email for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
Unable to send the alarm "{subject.name}" via the SNMP protocol for entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
